title: Accurate ender eyes
description:
Makes enderpearls, ender eyes, phantom eyes, and the xp bar purple.
Also changes the healing beam from ender crystals.
body: This texturepack makes some of the end category textures match the caracteristic purple colour. for the ender eyes, they are green because originally the texture on the enderman model was also green, but now its purple, so i corrected it making the item also purple
